# autohotkey-mcp

MCP server for AutoHotkey v2 scriptlet management. List, run, stop, and inspect
AHK scripts from any MCP host. AI generation via FastMCP sampling (Cursor/Claude)
or local HTTP (Ollama/LM Studio). Fleet-standard web dashboard on 10746/10747.

Shows a "CUA at work" blinking red HUD while scriptlets are running.

## Related

| Tool | Use for |
|------|---------|
| **[pywinauto-mcp](https://github.com/sandraschi/pywinauto-mcp)** | UIA element tree, OCR, structured GUI automation. Use this for modern apps with accessibility trees. Use autohotkey-mcp for low-level recording/replay. |

## Docs

- [README](README.md)
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [PRD](docs/PRD.md)

## Tools

- list_scriptlets, run_scriptlet, stop_scriptlet
- get_scriptlet_source, get_scriptlet_metadata
- generate_scriptlet, refine_ahk_prompt
- list_running_scriptlets, list_generation_prompts
- ahk_help, show_help
- show_scriptlets_card, show_running_scriptlets_card
- show_ahk_help_card, show_scriptlet_detail_card
- show_generation_result_card, show_server_status_card

## Config

- AUTOHOTKEY_SCRIPT_DEPOT: path to autohotkey-test depot
- AUTOHOTKEY_BRIDGE_URL: ScriptletCOMBridge base URL (default http://127.0.0.1:10744)
- AUTOHOTKEY_EXE: path to AutoHotkey v2 exe
- PORT: backend port (default 10746)
- AUTOHOTKEY_LLM_BASE_URL / AUTOHOTKEY_LLM_MODEL: local LLM for HTTP fallback

## Ports

- 10746: FastAPI backend (MCP HTTP + REST API)
- 10747: Vite React frontend (SPA)
